- https://kubemastery.com/en
- https://kubemastery.com/en/pricing

## Legal
- https://kubemastery.com/en/privacy-policy
- https://kubemastery.com/en/terms-of-service

## Crawl Scope Guidance
- Public pages above are indexable.
- Authenticated areas, profile and lesson detail routes are non-indexable.
